title: Andhra Pradesh Agriculture Budget Unveils Rs 53,752 Cr Farm Revival Plan
summary: The AP government has proposed a massive outlay of Rs 53,752 crore for agriculture and allied sectors, focusing on water security, agritech, and improving farmer incomes.

title: Tamil Nadu Posts Higher Foodgrain Coverage Despite Cyclone Fengal
summary: Tamil Nadu recorded a marginally higher coverage of foodgrains in 2024-25 compared to the previous year, achieving 38.6 lakh hectares despite crop damage from Cyclone Fengal.

title: AP Agriculture Dept Signs MoU with Wadhwani AI for Crop Management
summary: The Andhra Pradesh Department of Agriculture has partnered with Wadhwani AI to deploy artificial intelligence tools for real-time crop assessment and pest detection.

title: Andhra Pradesh Records 2.28% Drop in Chemical Fertiliser Usage
summary: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu informed the Union Agriculture Minister that AP achieved a significant reduction in chemical fertilizer use through the promotion of natural farming.

title: Tamil Nadu Agriculture Budget 2025-26: Focus on Traditional Vegetables
summary: The TN Budget allocates funds to promote traditional vegetable varieties like Manaparrai Kathari and Tharuvai Thakkali to preserve biodiversity.

title: AP to Make Farmer 'Live Like King' with New Initiatives
summary: The AP government launched 'Rythanna Mee Kosam', a program ensuring water security and demand-driven crops to make agriculture profitable.

title: Tamil Nadu Allocates Rs 1.6 Crore for Jasmine Cultivation
summary: Recognizing the cultural importance of Madurai Jasmine, the state government has allocated funds to expand its cultivation across 3,000 acres.

title: Digital Agriculture in AP: Satellite Monitoring for Soil Health
summary: Andhra Pradesh is adopting satellite-based AI to monitor soil moisture and vegetation indices, enabling smarter input usage for farmers.

title: TN Cashew Board Established with Rs 10 Crore Outlay
summary: A new Tamil Nadu Cashew Board will be set up to support cashew farmers and improve the processing and marketing of the crop.

title: Turmeric Prices Dip in AP Markets Amidst New Arrivals
summary: Farmer polished turmeric prices have seen a slight decline in Andhra Pradesh markets due to fresh harvest arrivals.

title: AP Budget Allocates Rs 30,000 Cr to Develop Rayalaseema as Horticulture Hub
summary: The Andhra Pradesh government plans to transform the Rayalaseema region into a global horticulture hub with massive investment.

title: Tamil Nadu Allocates Rs 12 Crore for Natural Farming in 37 Districts
summary: The TN Agriculture Budget emphasizes organic farming with a dedicated allocation to promote chemical-free cultivation across the state.

title: India Poised for Surge in Agri Exports to US After Trade Deal
summary: The interim trade agreement with the US is expected to boost Indian agricultural exports, with a competitive 18% tariff rate offering an advantage.

title: TN to Distribute 7,900 Power Tillers to Small Farmers
summary: To aid small and marginal farmers, the Tamil Nadu government will distribute power tillers and weeders under a new farm mechanization scheme.

title: National Pest Surveillance System Uses AI to Cut Crop Losses
summary: The Centre's new system utilizes AI and Machine Learning to detect pest infestations, currently supporting 65 crops and over 400 pests.

title: TN Budget: Solar-Powered Pumpsets for 1,000 Farmers
summary: The TN government will provide solar-powered pumpsets with a 70% subsidy for small and marginal farmers to promote renewable energy.

title: AP CM Seeks Rs 200 Crore for Coconut Sector Development
summary: Chandrababu Naidu has requested central assistance to establish coconut processing parks and modern markets in Andhra Pradesh.

title: India's Edible Oil Production Forecast at 9.6 MT for 2025-26
summary: Domestic edible oil output is rising but will only cover 40% of demand, necessitating continued large-scale imports.

title: TN Govt Allocates Rs 5.62 Crore to Improve Cattle Reproduction
summary: A new scheme will address infertility in cattle through programmed breeding across 2,741 veterinary dispensaries.

title: Drones and IoT Transforming Indian Agriculture in 2026
summary: Adoption of drone-assisted field management for pest identification and nutrient deficiency is rising rapidly across Indian farms.

title: TN Budget: Special Scheme for Spices across 17,500 Acres
summary: Tamil Nadu has launched a special scheme to promote spice cultivation, benefiting 23,000 farmers with a Rs 11.74 crore allocation.

title: AP Govt to Integrate IoT and Robotics in Farming
summary: As part of the 'Swarna Andhra-2047' vision, the AP government plans to integrate IoT, drones, and robotics into farming practices.

title: Onion Storage Subsidy Announced in Tamil Nadu
summary: To control price surges, the TN government will provide subsidies for establishing 36,000 MT of onion storage structures.

title: Makhana Development Board Proposed for Andhra Pradesh
summary: AP CM Naidu has proposed setting up a Makhana Development Board, identifying 50,000 acres in Kolleru Lake region as suitable for cultivation.

title: TN Government Sanctions Rs 546 Crore Input Subsidy
summary: Following crop damages from unseasonal rains, the Tamil Nadu government has sanctioned Rs 546 crore as input subsidy to 6.16 lakh farmers.

title: AB InBev India Plans 16,000+ Tonnes Barley Procurement
summary: Brewing giant AB InBev has announced plans to procure over 16,000 tonnes of barley domestically in 2026, boosting local farmers.

title: Climate Change Reducing Wheat and Rice Yields in North India
summary: Studies indicate a 1°C increase in temperature could reduce rice yields by 4 to 5 quintals per hectare in northern and western India.

title: Tamil Nadu Promotes Vermicompost with New Subsidy
summary: To encourage organic inputs, TN has allocated Rs 3.50 crore for vermicompost production using cow dung at district livestock farms.

title: World's Largest Grain Storage Plan: MP Pilot Completed
summary: A pilot project for the 'World's Largest Grain Storage Plan in Cooperative Sector' has been successfully completed in Balaghat, MP.

title: TAFE Launches Massey Dynastar Season 3
summary: Tractor major TAFE has launched the third season of its 'Massey Dynastar' contest to reward rural innovation and farming excellence.

title: AP Allocates Rs 7,241 Crore for Free Power to Farmers
summary: The Andhra Pradesh budget continues its strong support for farmers with a massive allocation for subsidized electricity.

title: TN Budget: Rs 1,168 Crore for Micro Irrigation
summary: Tamil Nadu plans to cover 3 lakh acres under micro-irrigation systems in 2025-26 to improve water use efficiency.

title: AP CM Requests Release of PM PRANAM Funds
summary: Chandrababu Naidu has urged the Centre to release funds under the PM PRANAM scheme to support the state's natural farming initiatives.

title: Subsidy for Power-Driven Chaff Cutters in TN
summary: To reduce fodder wastage, the TN government is offering a 50% subsidy for 3,000 power-driven chaff cutters for small farmers.

title: UPL Posts 13% EBITDA Growth in Q3
summary: Agrochemical major UPL has reported strong financial results, driven by better product mix and operational efficiencies.

title: Gene-Edited Crops Entering Indian Fields
summary: Research-approved gene-edited crop varieties are beginning to be adopted, offering better pest resistance and nutrient usage.

title: TN Budget: Rs 10 Crore for Cashew Board
summary: The Tamil Nadu government has allocated Rs 10 crore for the establishment of a Cashew Board to streamline the industry.

title: Totapuri Mango Farmers in AP Get Support
summary: AP Govt and Centre have disbursed Rs 200 crore to support Totapuri mango farmers affected by falling prices.

title: TN Encourages Avocado Cultivation
summary: In a move to diversify hill agriculture, Tamil Nadu will promote avocado cultivation across 500 acres.

title: Maize Futures Dip Slightly in February
summary: Industrial grade maize futures for Feb 2026 delivery saw a marginal dip of 0.82% in Indian commodity markets.
